message:
test(e2e): Add mobile UX audit test suite with device matrix

Comprehensive end-to-end test suite for mobile-specific UX validation
with support for multiple device configurations.

playwright.config.ts:
- Extended project matrix with mobile device emulation:
  - mobile-small (iPhone SE)
  - mobile-medium (iPhone 14)
  - mobile-large (iPhone 14 Pro Max)
  - android-phone (Pixel 7)
  - mobile-landscape (iPhone 14 landscape)
  - tablet-small (iPad Mini)
  - tablet-large (iPad Pro 11)
- All iOS devices use Chromium for WebKit-free CI compatibility
- Added video and trace capture on failure for debugging
- Increased expect timeout to 10 seconds for mobile
- CI mode: single worker, 2 retries for flakiness mitigation

mobile-ux-audit.spec.ts:
Test categories covered:
- Layout & Overflow: horizontal scroll detection, viewport containment
- Touch Targets: WCAG 2.5.5 compliance (44x44 minimum)
- Overlay Behavior: proper rendering, backdrop, close functionality
- Control Deck: visibility, button sizing, functionality
- Typography: minimum font sizes, line heights, text overflow
- Navigation: phage list scrolling, drawer behavior
- Form Controls: select sizing, input touch targets

Helper utilities:
- isMobileViewport/isPhoneViewport for conditional assertions
- getElementDimensions for touch target validation
- isInViewport for visibility checking
- hasHorizontalOverflow for scroll detection
- getOverflowingElements for layout debugging

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,18 +1,89 @@
 import { defineConfig, devices } from '@playwright/test';
 
+// Use Chromium for all mobile emulation to avoid WebKit dependency issues
+const chromiumMobile = (device: typeof devices[keyof typeof devices]) => ({
+  ...device,
+  // Force Chromium channel instead of WebKit
+  channel: undefined,
+});
+
 export default defineConfig({
   testDir: './e2e',
   timeout: 60000,
+  expect: {
+    timeout: 10000,
+  },
+  fullyParallel: true,
+  forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
+  retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
+  workers: process.env.CI ? 1 : undefined,
+  reporter: [
+    ['html', { outputFolder: 'playwright-report' }],
+    ['list'],
+  ],
   use: {
     baseURL: 'http://localhost:5173',
     headless: true,
     screenshot: 'only-on-failure',
+    video: 'retain-on-failure',
+    trace: 'retain-on-failure',
   },
   outputDir: 'test-results',
   projects: [
+    // Desktop browsers
     {
       name: 'chromium',
       use: { ...devices['Desktop Chrome'] },
     },
+    // Mobile devices - Portrait (all using Chromium engine for consistency)
+    {
+      name: 'mobile-small',
+      use: {
+        ...devices['iPhone SE'],
+        // Override to use Chromium
+        defaultBrowserType: 'chromium',
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      name: 'mobile-medium',
+      use: {
+        ...devices['iPhone 14'],
+        defaultBrowserType: 'chromium',
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      name: 'mobile-large',
+      use: {
+        ...devices['iPhone 14 Pro Max'],
+        defaultBrowserType: 'chromium',
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      name: 'android-phone',
+      use: { ...devices['Pixel 7'] },
+    },
+    // Mobile devices - Landscape
+    {
+      name: 'mobile-landscape',
+      use: {
+        ...devices['iPhone 14 landscape'],
+        defaultBrowserType: 'chromium',
+      },
+    },
+    // Tablets
+    {
+      name: 'tablet-small',
+      use: {
+        ...devices['iPad Mini'],
+        defaultBrowserType: 'chromium',
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      name: 'tablet-large',
+      use: {
+        ...devices['iPad Pro 11'],
+        defaultBrowserType: 'chromium',
+      },
+    },
   ],
 });
